question: Before I purchased the gravel bike, do I have other bikes in addition to my mountain bike and my commuter bike?
ground_truth_answer: Yes. (You have a road bike too.)

retrieval_results.context:
User owns four bikes (road, mountain, commuter, hybrid)
User also owns a commuter bike
User also owns a mountain bike
User uses commuter bike for daily commutes
User experiences varied terrain and avoids boredom by owning multiple bikes
User recently purchased a hybrid bike
User uses mountain bike for trail rides
Sharing road bike with mountain and commuter bikes may accelerate component wear
